title: Surgeon Vacancy at BD India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at BD India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BD India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BD India:
BD India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BD India!
